title: Primary Conflict & Resolution Engine (Shadow Only)

objectives.extract_primary_conflict: Extract primary conflict from conflict graph using only algorithmic rules
objectives.determine_resolution_status: Determine resolution_status (resolved/partially_resolved/unresolved/ambiguous) based on outcome presence and chain_confidence >= 0.75
objectives.shadow_only_output: Attach primary_conflict and resolution to _runtime_v7_shadow.narrative only
objectives.maintain_backward_compatibility: No changes to production payload structure
objectives.no_book_specific_heuristics: Use only algorithmic rules, no book titles/authors/hardcoded references

diagnostics.conflict_resolution_score: Average of conflict and resolution confidence

adapter_integration.shadow_attachment: Lines 321-324: Adds primary_conflict and resolution to shadow.narrative

backward_compatibility.production_payload: UNCHANGED - Shadow-only output attached via _runtime_v7_shadow key
backward_compatibility.existing_routes: COMPATIBLE - Shadow data does not affect production responses
backward_compatibility.performance_impact: Minimal - Shadow pipeline runs in conditional block only when feature flag enabled

requirements_met.primary_conflict_extraction: YES - Extracts from conflict_graph using algorithmic rules
requirements_met.resolution_determination: YES - Uses outcome presence and chain_confidence thresholds
requirements_met.no_book_heuristics: YES - All rules algorithmic, no hardcoded references
